mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_certificate
AND (member_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR cert_type LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_approval
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR requester_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_minutes
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR author_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_archive
AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR doc_type LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
